previewPrompts.Maths: Do you know what we use fractions for in real life?
previewPrompts.Science: Can you name one thing that changes from solid to liquid?
previewPrompts.English: What makes a piece of writing convincing to you?
previewPrompts.HSIE: What do you know about how our local community works?
previewPrompts.Creative Arts: What colours do you think make a painting look peaceful?
previewPrompts.PE: How do you think you can improve your team's speed?

Maths.title: Fraction War Card Game
Maths.desc: Use a deck of cards to create fractions. Highest fraction wins the round.

Maths.title: Supermarket Maths
Maths.desc: Let them calculate totals and change during the next grocery run.

Maths.title: Measure the House
Maths.desc: Estimate then measure furniture — compare metric and informal units.

Science.title: Kitchen Garden Experiment
Science.desc: Grow beans in a jar — observe roots and shoots forming over days.

Science.title: States of Matter Kitchen Lab
Science.desc: Observe ice melting and water boiling — record observations together.

Science.title: Shadow Tracing
Science.desc: Trace shadows hourly to understand how the sun moves.

English.title: Story Starter Jar
English.desc: Write prompts on paper, pull one out, write for 10 minutes.

English.title: Family Newspaper
English.desc: Write a short article about something that happened this week.

English.title: Persuasion Challenge
English.desc: Give them 2 mins to convince you of something — then discuss.

HSIE.title: Map Your Neighbourhood
HSIE.desc: Draw a map of your local area with landmarks.

HSIE.title: Community Photo Walk
HSIE.desc: Photograph things that show community roles (post box, park, school).

HSIE.title: Country Research Box
HSIE.desc: Pick a country and find 5 interesting facts together.

Creative Arts.title: Watercolour Wash Sunset
Creative Arts.desc: Practice blending colours to create a gradient sky.

Creative Arts.title: Rhythm Clapping Game
Creative Arts.desc: Clap patterns and challenge each other to repeat them.

Creative Arts.title: Mini Play
Creative Arts.desc: Act out a favourite story scene — swap roles.

PE.title: Backyard Obstacle Course
PE.desc: Set up a timed course with hula hoops, cones, and jumps.

PE.title: Target Throwing
PE.desc: Throw beanbags at chalk circles — record accuracy.

PE.title: Bike Ride Challenge
PE.desc: Set a distance goal and track it on a map app.

Science.q: Water changing from liquid to gas is called?
Which organism makes its own food from sunlight?

English.q: A piece of writing that tries to convince is called…?

HSIE.q: What is the capital of Australia?

PE.q: How many players in a basketball team on court?
Which muscle group do squats primarily work?
